dct_title_s: Map of the city of Richmond, Virginia
dct_description_sm: From a survey by I.H. Adams, Assist., U.S. Coast Survey, 1858, with additions from Smith's map of Henrico County, 1853 ; prepared at the U.S. Coast Survey Office, A.D. Bache, Supt. H. Lindenkohl & Chas. G. Krebs, lith.
Coordinates approximate and based on Greenwich meridian.
General map indicating streets and street names, important buildings, and relief by hachures. Water is tinted blue.
dct_rights_sm: Images from the David Rumsey Map Center's general collections courtesy of Stanford University Libraries. This item is in the public domain. There are no restrictions on use. If you have questions, please contact the David Rumsey Map Center at rumseymapcenter@stanford.edu.
